data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding preference learning affecting box contents.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that preference learning affects box contents. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for preference learning, but without concrete evidence, the validation cannot be completed.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or state checks confirming that preference learning affects box contents.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement of preference learning affecting box contents.
